message:
🐛 Fix FeedbackModal silent failures and keyboard handling (Fixes #10476) (#10482)

- Add validation with inline error messages (red border + error text) when
  submitting with empty title/description instead of silently returning
- Add reader.onerror handlers to SubmitTab's handlePaste and
  handleScreenshotFiles so failed screenshot reads show a toast warning
- Fix Space key closing FeedbackModal when focus is on a button by adding
  closest() check for interactive elements (matching useModalNavigation)
- Remove misleading "Space close" keyboard hint from both modal footers

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
